description_long: This is a grand piano with a large, angular body and a raised lid, revealing the inner soundboard area. The piano features a full-length keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and its exterior is finished in a dark, matte brown color. The legs are sturdy and slightly tapered, supporting the main body above the ground. The lid is propped open, allowing a view into the interior, which appears to be made of wood. No pedals or music stand are visible in any of the views. The overall design is simple and stylized, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A dark brown grand piano with a raised lid, full keyboard, and sturdy legs, lacking visible pedals or a music stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard and the open lid, with both legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open lid, the depth of the body, and the keyboard extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the lid's shape and the piano's broad, curved back.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the overall outline of the piano and the closed portion of the lid.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard with alternating white and black keys, approximately 36 keys visible, evenly spaced, no split or missing keys.
